task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or an Odoo application screen is visible, indicating a successful login (typically as 'admin' or 'Mitchell Admin' in the top right corner).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Quality Alerts creation screen
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Quality app is open, specifically showing the Quality Alerts kanban, list view, or a new Quality Alert form.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Quality Alert title
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field of the Quality Alert form contains exactly 'Surface Cracks on Batch 001'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct product for the alert
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Product' field in the Quality Alert form is set to 'Cabinet with Doors'.
The description or notes text area contains exactly: 'Multiple units in Batch 001 show visible surface cracks near corner joints. Requires immediate quality review and supplier notification.'

The Quality Alert form is in a saved/view state (e.g., a 'Save' button was clicked, or the breadcrumbs show the newly created alert title without the 'New' indicator), confirming the record was created.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Odoo GUI, not a terminal executing curl or python XML-RPC scripts.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into actual Odoo form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The text for the title, product, and description are visible inside the standard Odoo web form inputs, not in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The environment appears to be the genuine Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'localhost:8069' with typical Odoo routing parameters (e.g., web#action=...&model=quality.alert), and standard Odoo UI elements like the top navigation bar are present.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task takes place in Odoo 17 at http://localhost:8069. The agent must log in with admin/admin. The required Quality Alert must have the title 'Surface Cracks on Batch 001', the product 'Cabinet with Doors', and the exact description: 'Multiple units in Batch 001 show visible surface cracks near corner joints. Requires immediate quality review and supplier notification.' The verifier is a stub, so visual confirmation of the saved Odoo form with these exact details is the only way to verify success.
